conflictingExtension.message: Moonlight is not working because you have other conflicting PDF viewers installed.

extDescription.message: Everything you need to read a paper: explanation, summary, translation, chat, and reference search.

extName.message: Moonlight: AI Colleague for Research Papers

localFileNotEnabled.message: Local file access is not enabled.

openAnyPDFLink.message: Open any pdf link or open a local pdf file to start using Moonlight. (Moonlight may not work if you have other PDF viewers installed.)

toReadLocalPDFs.message: To read local PDFs with Moonlight, enable access to file URLs in the settings, and then reload the PDF.
